testcase.name: test_get_available_reports_returns_13

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected report 'tickets_by_status' not found assert 'tickets_by_status' in ['tickets_created', 'tickets_closed', 'open_ticket_aging', 'avg_first_response', 'avg_resolution_time', 'sla_compliance', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_transitions_and_reports.py:214: in test_get_available_reports_returns_13 assert expected in report_ids, f"Expected report '{expected}' not found" E AssertionError: Expected report 'tickets_by_status' not found E assert 'tickets_by_status' in ['tickets_created', 'tickets_closed', 'open_ticket_aging', 'avg_first_response', 'avg_resolution_time', 'sla_compliance', ...]

testcase.name: test_generate_tickets_by_status_report
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_transitions_and_reports.py:337: in test_generate_tickets_by_status_report assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to generate report: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to generate report: {"detail":"Report not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
